fields.helpText: This field contains the internal entry number of this type of discharge as determined by VA FileMan and the MAS software package.  This number may be used by various software modules throughout DHCP.  It must not be altered nor should entries be added or removed from this file.

This field contains the name of all allowable military discharge types as determined by VACO.  This information is maintained by the MAS software package through frequent releases and should not be edited at the site level.
This field contains an abbreviate for this military discharge type.  On outputs or displays where the full name of the discharge may not fit, this abbreviation will be displayed instead.
